•3 reviews [...] #### What's great

free tier (9)built-in assets (6)auto-coloring feature (2)content library (2)

30 views

•3 reviews

I think Lunacy is one of the most innovative "not headline grabbing" piece of software in the last decade. The only fact that the team manage to create a version for all tree major desktop operating system ( Windows, Linux and macOS ) is in itself an exceptional achievement. The other plus is the user driven features implementation. Great UI/UX ! I will say that user preferences settings are still limited. There is a need for better YouTube video on how to use the software to foster more adoption.

#### What's great

cross-platform (2)

#### What needs improvement

limited user preferences (1)

Report

 35 views

•1 review [...] limited user preferences (1)

Report

 35 views

•1 review

Excellent alternative to Figma. It is powered with every tool to develope your UI as components and prototype. It has a free plan option, has periodic updates and I havent't noticed any issue with stability on Windows application. It currently misses the support to the whole community ecosystem, but Icons8 itself, the developer, has a whole collection of services that can complement your workflow and consider that is always nice to us customers to have a competitor on the market.

#### What's great

free tier (9)native app (2)

#### What needs improvement

no plugin support (2)
